title: StockerTV Pipeline Template Client Config
description: Per-client configuration loaded by js/client-loader.js for pipeline-template.html. One JSON file per client (e.g. config/nvidia.json, config/etoro.json).
$comment: Known v1 limitations: (1) Flag library is finite — countryCode enum lists the supported set; adding a flag requires editing js/client-loader.js. (2) multilang.languages supports 2-5 entries; 1 or 6+ may cause layout issues. (3) Default fallback client is hardcoded to 'nvidia' in client-loader.js. (4) config files fetched with cache:'no-store' but GitHub Pages CDN may cache for up to ~10 minutes after deploy.

$schema.description: Optional path to this schema file for editor tooling.

branding.description: Client identity and color palette. Colors override CSS custom properties on <html>.

clientName.description: Display name used where clientName is referenced (logo fallback, etc.).

logoUrl.description: Optional path to a client logo. Null = use textual brand.

primaryColor.description: Hex color; overrides CSS --accent. Main brand color — drives CTA gradient bottom stop, brand marks, active states.

accentColor.description: Hex color; overrides CSS --green. Success/completion color — checkmarks, validation ticks, compliance pass states.

accentDeep.description: Hex color; overrides CSS --accent-deep. Top stop of the default CTA gradient and bottom stop of the hover CTA gradient. Pick one shade darker/richer than primaryColor to match the original nvidia gradient depth, or one shade lighter to invert.

accent2.description: Hex color; overrides CSS --accent-2. Top stop of the hover CTA gradient — usually the lightest shade in the primary palette.

eyebrow.description: Small tagline above the hero headline.

titleHtml.description:
Hero headline. HTML allowed (brand spans,
). Rendered via innerHTML.

ctaSub.description: Subtitle under the CTA, e.g. 'Curated NVIDIA story · 47 sec'.

value.description: The large number or figure, e.g. '32,190'.

label.description: Short label after the value, e.g. 'companies'.

yAxisLabels.description: Exactly 5 Y-axis labels, top-to-bottom (max value → zero). Must fit chart.series[] max in showcase stage 9.

docTitle.description: Large title at top of audit doc, usually 'Audit Trail'.

docSubtitle.description: Subtitle line, e.g. 'NVIDIA · Q4 FY2025 Financial Update'.

combinedCapHeadline.description: Bold phrase after 'Same script, three markets —', e.g. '$27T combined market cap reached'.

languages.description: 2 to 5 language columns. Layout CSS grid auto-adjusts via --lang-cols custom property.

id.description: ISO 639-1 language code. Used as #lang-{id} DOM id and as the id key inside showcase.stages[12].data.languages[].

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2. Picks a flag from the built-in library in js/client-loader.js. v1 supports exactly this list; adding a country requires editing the loader.

marketCaption.description: Line under the flag, e.g. 'NYSE · $24T market cap'.

ctaLabel.description: Final stage button label, e.g. 'Generate Avatar Video →'.

runtimeNote.description: Small grey text under the big runtime number, e.g. 'Pipeline runtime: 47 seconds · Demo replay slowed for visibility'.

thumbnail_brand_mark.description: Brand text shown on every thumbnail card in Stage 10. Replaces the hardcoded 'NVIDIA' in pipeline-template.js.

avatar_video_url.description: URL of the avatar-reveal video played when Stage 15 CTA fires. Null skips the modal. Replaces hardcoded Supabase URL in pipeline-template.js.

showcase.description: Payload assigned to window.PIPELINE_SHOWCASE — consumed by pipeline-template.js exactly like the current pipeline-showcase.js global.

stages.description: Exactly 15 stage objects, in order. See per-stage shape in the stage items.

delayMs.description: Time offset from demo start when this stage activates.

data.description: Stage-specific payload. Shape depends on 'name' — see pipeline-template.js renderers for the contract. Key shapes: article_input {title,source,publishedAt,wordCount,fullText}; watcher_detection {source,publishedAt,ticker,exchange,noveltyScore,noveltyReason}; company_enrichment {name,ticker,sector,industry,ceo,headquarters,foundedYear,marketCap,lastPrice,week52High,week52Low,keyProducts,competitors,description,dbSize,dbExchanges}; fact_extraction {facts[{text,sourceSpan}],totalWords,fullText}; sec_validation {validations[{fact,status,source}]}; cross_reference {center,nodes[{name,ticker,relation}],note}; reporter_selection {selected,reasoning}; script_generation {model,wordCount,script[]}; chart_suggestion {type,series[{q,v}]}; thumbnail_generation {options[{headline,number,foot,recommended?}]}; compliance_red_pass {draftScript,violations[{phrase,ruleId,ruleName,severity,spanStart,spanEnd}],rewrittenScript,rewrites[{from,to}]}; compliance_gates {l1/l2/l3 each {ms,passed,msg}, qualityScore, complianceScore}; multilanguage {languages[{id,script[]}],driftPct}; audit_trail {steps,durationSec,humanInterventions}; final_output {reporter,reporterRole,finalScript,qualityScore,complianceScore,ticker,exchange,source,totalSeconds}.
